title: Fake Manhunt [by ApexStudio]
description: Record a fake manhunt so that no one finds out about it...
body:
## 📸 Shoot fake videos with our plugin, and no one will know about it...

![FAKE MANHUNT](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f932337b70a74b8fdbce823169b6849548cd5b8c.png)

## ⭐ What is Fake ManHunt?
### 
Fake Manhunt is a plugin for **shooting fake videos** of the "ManHunt" category. The mod provides **all the amenities** for players shooting fake ManHunt. Below you can see the **functions and commands** of our plugin!

## ⚡ Commands:
### 
- Assigning players to groups. There are two groups "Speedrunner" and "Hunter". 
 - The command to assign a speedrunner is ``` /manhunt set "player name" speedrunner ```
 - And to assign a player to the Hunter group, the command is ``` /manhunt set "player name" hunter ```
 - The command to start the ManHunt is ``` /manhunt start ``` (the ManHunt will start if there are at least 2 hunters in the team) 
 - Command to stop the game - ``` /manhunt stop ```
 - When a player from the Speedrunner group dies, items and experience are retained by the player. This function can be disabled with the command - ``` /manhunt save false ```
 - And turn it back on with the command - ``` /manhunt save true ```
 - The "Speedrunner" team ``` /back ``` group can return to the place of their death. 
- The "Speedrunner" group should have the color "Green" in the chat and tab. 
- The "Hunter" group should have the color "Red" in the chat and tab.

## 📄 Documentation
### 
**The documentation** is available on **the GitHub** website: [https://github.com/ztuka123/FakeManHunt/blob/main/Documentation.md](https://github.com/ztuka123/FakeManHunt/blob/main/Documentation.md)


## 🖥️ Bugs, flaws, or new ideas
### 
If you have any **bugs, flaws, or new ideas** for the plugin, please write to me at Discord: **ztuka123**
